# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: bool ()
  entry:
      x_1 = 10
      y_1 = 20
      t1 = CMP_EQ x_1, y_1
      eq_1 = t1
      t2 = CMP_NE x_1, y_1
      ne_1 = t2
      t3 = CMP_LT x_1, y_1
      lt_1 = t3
      t4 = CMP_LE x_1, y_1
      le_1 = t4
      t5 = CMP_GT x_1, y_1
      gt_1 = t5
      t6 = CMP_GE x_1, y_1
      ge_1 = t6
      RETURN eq_1
